name: Outworld Staff
description:
Active: Self-Exile

Makes the caster completely invulnerable and disabled for %invuln_duration% seconds. When returning to the world, the caster takes %self_dmg_pct%%% of their maximum health as damage.
notes: Damage taken when returning is non-lethal and disables Blink Dagger and other items that are muted upon taking damage.
lore: Proof that the lone sentinel was not always so.
